staticText: Deterministic browser-local inventory calculator in English, French and Swahili. Stock cost value equals the sum of user-entered unit cost times quantity on hand; it is not FIFO, weighted-average valuation or COGS. Potential sales equal selling price times quantity on hand. Potential gross profit equals selling price minus unit cost, times quantity, and remains signed. Low stock means quantity is less than or equal to the user-entered reorder point. Optional suggested reorder units equal max(target stock minus quantity, zero); without a target there is no reorder quantity. Never infer tax, VAT, FX, demand, supplier prices, lead times, accounting valuation, stockout guarantees, revenue guarantees or purchase advice. Product data remains local unless the user explicitly exports it.
